page_metadata.biotools__summary: Performs gene set analysis using various statistical methods, from different gene level statistics and a wide range of gene-set collections. Furthermore, this package contains functions for combining the results of multiple runs of gene set analyses.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Performs gene set analysis using various statistical methods, from different gene level statistics and a wide range of gene-set collections. Furthermore, this package contains functions for combining the results of multiple runs of gene set analyses.
